tiles.title: Kandla Grey Sandstone
tiles.description: Natural grey sandstone tile with subtle linear markings, ideal for outdoor patios and pathways.

tiles.title: Carrara White Marble
tiles.description: Classic Carrara white marble tile with soft grey veining for luxurious bathroom and kitchen surfaces.

tiles.title: Terracotta Rustic Tile
tiles.description: Handmade terracotta tile with warm earthy tones, perfect for Mediterranean-style kitchens and patios.

tiles.title: Jet Black Porcelain
tiles.description: Sleek jet black porcelain tile with polished finish, perfect for modern bathrooms and feature walls.

tiles.title: Hexagon White Mosaic
tiles.description: Small hexagon white ceramic mosaic tile, great for bathroom floors and decorative wall features.

tiles.title: Slate Anthracite Tile
tiles.description: Dark anthracite slate tile with natural cleft surface texture, suitable for floors and exterior walls.

tiles.title: Ivory Travertine Tile
tiles.description: Warm ivory travertine tile with natural pitted surface, ideal for living rooms and hallways.

tiles.title: Geometric Black & White
tiles.description: Bold geometric patterned tile in black and white, a statement choice for hallways and kitchen floors.

tiles.title: Beige Limestone Tile
tiles.description: Soft beige limestone tile with smooth honed finish, versatile for both walls and floors.

tiles.title: Wood Effect Oak Plank
tiles.description: Realistic oak wood-effect porcelain plank tile, combining natural warmth with the durability of porcelain.

tiles.title: Blue Zellige Wall Tile
tiles.description: Hand-glazed Moroccan zellige tile in ocean blue, adds artisan character to kitchen splashbacks.

tiles.title: Concrete Effect Grey
tiles.description: Industrial concrete-effect porcelain tile in mid grey, perfect for modern kitchens and bathrooms.

tiles.title: Pink Blush Ceramic
tiles.description: Soft pink blush ceramic wall tile with matte finish, ideal for feature walls and bathroom splashbacks.

tiles.title: Green Forest Porcelain
tiles.description: Deep forest green porcelain tile with subtle texture, a bold choice for accent walls and floors.

tiles.title: Cream Subway Tile
tiles.description: Classic cream subway tile with bevelled edge, timeless choice for kitchen walls and bathroom surrounds.

tiles.title: Sage Green Wall Tile
tiles.description: Soft sage green ceramic wall tile with a satin finish, perfect for calming bathroom and kitchen spaces.

tiles.title: Onyx Black Marble
tiles.description: Dramatic onyx black marble tile with gold veining, a luxury statement for feature walls and floors.

tiles.title: Pebble Stone Mosaic
tiles.description: Natural river pebble stone mosaic tile, brings organic texture to shower floors and garden paths.
